This directory vendors the upstream Stockfish NNUE training-data format helpers used by the native `.binpack` bridge.

- Upstream repository: <https://github.com/official-stockfish/nnue-pytorch>
- Vendored commit: `a4385220412aa66bff1b9fb6b76cebf38c4ff035`
- Files copied:
  - `nnue_training_data_formats.h`
  - `rng.h`
  - `thread_safe_types.h`

These files retain their original license headers.
